ogTitle: Toowoon Bay vs Topi Topi: Climate Safety

heading: Toowoon Bay vs Topi Topi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toowoon Bay, New South Wales and Topi Topi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toowoon Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Topi Topi (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toowoon Bay or Topi Topi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toowoon Bay has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Topi Topi scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toowoon Bay scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Topi Topi scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toowoon Bay or Topi Topi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toowoon Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
